assessment.summary_for_seller: Critical error: you promised something Mellow should not promise.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message is too generic and misses the signal context.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow removes misclassification risk entirely, takes full responsibility for everything, and we should jump on a call tomorrow.

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller made a false promise about misclassification.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow removes misclassification risk entirely, takes full responsibility for everything, and we should jump on a call tomorrow.

criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow removes misclassification risk entirely, takes full responsibility for everything, and we should jump on a call tomorrow.

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: Objections addressed weakly or not followed through.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow removes misclassification risk entirely, takes full responsibility for everything, and we should jump on a call tomorrow.

objections.objection: That overclaim kills credibility. If you want to continue, restate Mellow's scope without magical promises.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

transcript.text: Mellow removes misclassification risk entirely, takes full responsibility for everything, and we should jump on a call tomorrow.
That overclaim kills credibility. If you want to continue, restate Mellow's scope without magical promises.
